stories.title: Implement RotatingSecrets.Supervisor
acceptanceCriteria: Module uses Supervisor and starts two children: {Registry, keys: :unique, name: RotatingSecrets.ProcessRegistry} and {DynamicSupervisor, name: RotatingSecrets.DynamicSupervisor, max_restarts: 3, max_seconds: 30}
Supervisor strategy is :rest_for_one so that ProcessRegistry crash cascades to DynamicSupervisor restart
register/2 starts a Registry child via DynamicSupervisor.start_child; default server_name is {:via, Registry, {RotatingSecrets.ProcessRegistry, name}}
register/2 accepts :registry_via option to override server_name for Horde compatibility
deregister/1 looks up the pid in ProcessRegistry and calls DynamicSupervisor.terminate_child; returns {:error, :not_found} when name is absent
mix compile in rotating_secrets/ passes with no warnings

stories.title: Unit tests for Supervisor
acceptanceCriteria: Test: supervisor starts and both ProcessRegistry and DynamicSupervisor are alive
Test: register/2 starts a secret process and it is reachable via GenServer.call(:current)
Test: deregister/1 terminates the registered process
Test: deregister/1 returns {:error, :not_found} for an unknown name
mix test in rotating_secrets/ passes with no failures
